case_title: RITA LARK VS. JOHN STEWART COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LARK, RITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHN STEWART COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00, FOR BREACH OF COVENANT OF QUIET ENJOYMENT INCLUDING HARASSMENT BY OTHER TENANTS OF MINOR DAUGHTER AND SMOKE AND DRUG USE IN COMMON AREAS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Appellant/Defendant: John Zanghi, counsel for John Stewart Company
Respondent/Plaintiff:Rita Lark

This cause comes on regularly for Trial de Novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn

John Zanghi, testifies on behalf of John Stewart Company, Appellant/Defendant

The following documentary evidence is introduced:

Exhibit 1, copy of the John Stewart company Dwelling Lease for Public Housing Tenants, is marked for identification
Exhibit 2, copy of Healthy Housing & Vector Control Inspection Report/Notice of violation from SF Department of Public health, is marked for identification
Exhibit 3, copy of Complaint form from CCSF Department of Public health, is marked for identification
Group Exhibit 4, copy of Incident report by Universal Protection Service, is marked for identification
Group Exhibit 5, copy of service report by PG & E dated 5-13-17 and Incident report by Universal Protection Service dated 5-13-17, is marked for identification

Rita Lark, Respondent/Plaintiff testifies on her own behalf

The following documentary evidence is introduced

Group exhibit A, letters, marked for identification.
Group exhibit B, Collection of papers
Exhibit C, Photograph of window
Group Exhibit D, collection of photographs

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Diane Kruze; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-07-2017 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-05-2017 Continued To Jul-07-17 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
